heading: Today
text: Cloudy, increasing winds, turning warmer. Spotty freezing rain early in NH. A period of showers this morning, then scattered showers, mainly east of the Greens this afternoon.  Highs 50s to low 60s, except 40s northeast.  Winds southeast 10 to 25 mph, gusting 35 to 50 mph, up to 60 mph in the Adirondacks.

heading: Tonight
text: Periods of rain, changing to snow showers west to east, up to an inch over the higher terrain, up to 3 inches in NY. Some clearing late.  Lows mid teens to mid 20s west to east north of Rt. 4, 20s to low 30s west to east in the south.  Winds southeast 10 to 25 mph, gusting 40 to 60 mph, becoming southwest up to 35 mph late.

heading: Tuesday
text: Some breaks of morning sun, mainly sunny east and south.  Mostly cloudy north and west, spreading east, with scattered snow showers in the north and mountains, up to an inch.  Highs in the mid 20s to mid 30s west to east. Southwest winds, becoming west 10 to 25 mph, gusting 25 to 35 mph.

heading: St. Patrick’s Day
text: Some breaks of morning sun, mainly sunny east and south.  Mostly cloudy north and west, spreading east, with scattered snow showers in the north and mountains, up to an inch.  Highs in the mid 20s to mid 30s west to east. Southwest winds, becoming west 10 to 25 mph, gusting 25 to 35 mph.
